# Play Runtime Vendor Notices

The iOS app bundles these browser runtime files so the TestFlight build can run
without depending on public CDNs:

- Bootstrap 5.3.3, MIT license, copyright 2011-2024 The Bootstrap Authors.
- React 18.3.1, MIT license, copyright Meta Platforms, Inc. and affiliates.
- React DOM 18.3.1, MIT license, copyright Meta Platforms, Inc. and affiliates.
- pako 2.1.0, MIT and Zlib licenses, copyright pako contributors.

Keep this notice with `site/play/vendor/` when updating vendored browser assets.
